name: Sensor Upgrade Module
effect: Your mech gains +2 Sensors, up to the maximum of 20 and additionally gain +1 Accuracy when performing the Search quick tech action.
description: An additional radar dish or an expanded sensor suite package installed to a mech allows one to increase their sensor detection range of incoming unknowns and bogeys.

name: System Suite Defrag
effect: Your mech gains +2 System Points and +1 to System saves and checks.
description: By removing bloatware and force optimizing a mechs onboard OS, one can reallocate and free up space to allow additional installations of more important system software and equipment profiles.

name: Explosive Reactive Armor
effect: 1/scene, the first weapon damage you take is reduced to 0 instead. This effect will not trigger if the damage received cannot be reduced.
description: The Little War taught us much, that ERAs are very viable in any theater of conventional warfare.

name: Drone Upgrade Module I
effect: Increase all your Drone's Size by one increment (e.g., from 1/2 to 1, 1 to 2 or 2 to 3), up to a maximum of Size 3 and your drones gain +1 Armor.
description: Reinforced frame and armor panel bracing for drones and sub-alterns, allows for an increased durability at the small exchange of increased bulk and weight.

name: Drone Upgrade Module II
effect: At the end of your turn, your Drones within your Sensors and Line of Sight may move a number of spaces equal to your GRIT + 1.
description: Direct wire communication allows for more optimized and efficient transfer of guided basic commands to sub-alterns and drones units within a mechs registered hemisphere of control.
